entries.title: Plan Artifact Family Registry Foundation
entries.summary: Adds the missing artifact family registry so plan-pack artifact placement, status subsets, and derived index participation stop living only in path conventions and scattered code.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the artifact family registry foundation, typed resolver, and alignment coverage for live plan artifact families.

entries.title: Plan Artifact Index Runtime Foundation
entries.summary: Publishes the missing live plan artifact index, removes legacy artifact-index field leakage, and exposes the cross-family query surface required by requirements.md and decisions.md.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Implemented the live artifact index runtime, query surface, validator wiring, and guidance updates required by requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Plan Core Documentation Template Authority Foundation
entries.summary: Adds the missing core-owned documentation family registry, template catalog, reusable templates, and validation coverage required by requirements.md.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the core-owned documentation family registry, template catalog, reusable templates, and explicit validation coverage required by requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Plan Documentation Family And Template Catalog Foundation
entries.summary: Adds the missing documentation-family registry and template catalog foundations for live plan guidance families and current rendered plan/project surfaces.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the documentation-family registry, template catalog, governed template assets, typed helpers, and validation coverage for current plan guidance and rendered surfaces.

entries.title: Plan Duplicated Foundations Corpus Bootstrap
entries.summary: Duplicates the current foundations corpus into core/docs/foundations and plan/docs/foundations so both roots carry the same guiding context required by requirements.md.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Duplicated the foundations corpus into core/docs and plan/docs and validated repository-path discovery for both mirrored roots.

entries.title: Plan Entrypoint Cutover Proof
entries.summary: Proves the pack-wide capture-first flow for the plan authority cutover.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the plan authority cutover proof and validated the live plan entrypoints.

entries.title: Plan Generic Sync Harness Export Foundation
entries.summary: Exports a reusable sync harness from watchtower_core.sync and refactors repo-local sync orchestration onto that generic layer so requirements.md and decisions.md no longer depend on a repo_ops-only sync coordinator.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Exported the reusable sync harness from watchtower_core.sync, refactored repo-local orchestration onto it, and aligned tests and package-boundary guidance to requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Plan Governance Surface Resolver Helper
entries.summary: Adds the missing governance surface resolver helper so pack and core governed surfaces can be resolved through one typed query surface instead of scattered loader and registry logic.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the governance surface resolver helper and unit coverage for pack-declared and governance-map surface resolution.

entries.title: Plan Human Surface Policy and Core Root Seeding
entries.summary: Adds the governed human-surface policy contract, the helper and validation path that resolve those rules, and the missing core-owned human roots that requirements.md declares as required.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the governed human-surface policy and seeded the missing core human roots.

entries.title: Plan Legacy History and Retention Reconciliation
entries.summary: Encodes the transitional archive policy and clean-endstate purge rules for legacy docs/planning history and closed initiative packages directly in the live plan authority.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the transitional retention policy registry and classified retained planning history.

entries.title: Plan Lifecycle Review And Source Vocab Registries
entries.summary: Adds the missing lifecycle-stage, review-status, and source-type registries plus typed helper coverage so plan-pack workflow semantics stop living only in scattered schema enums and runtime string literals.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the lifecycle-stage, review-status, and source-type registries, typed planning vocabulary helper, and runtime alignment coverage for plan workspace lifecycle semantics.

entries.title: Plan Live Query Authority Cutover
entries.summary: Cuts planning query authority over to the live plan workspace indexes and exposes the missing readiness, discrepancy, and project query surfaces required by requirements.md and decisions.md.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Cut public planning query authority over to the live plan workspace indexes, added readiness/discrepancy/project query commands, and aligned command guidance and authority docs to requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: Plan Project Context Runtime Standardization
entries.summary: Promotes project-scoped context loading into a first-class runtime surface layered on always-loaded pack context and proves it through a narrow query path.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the machine-first project-context runtime helper, explicit project-context query surface, and validation proving project context loads separately from derived project views.

entries.title: Plan Project Surface Policy Registry
entries.summary: Adds the missing project-surface policy registry plus helper-backed project validation so project containers follow a declared surface contract instead of hardcoded assumptions.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the project-surface policy registry, typed helper, and project validation integration for required project-root surfaces.

entries.title: Plan Promotion Policy and Guidance Indexes
entries.summary: Adds the missing promotion policy registry and pack-level promotion and guidance indexes so initiative-local promotion records and approved plan guidance are machine-queryable under plan/.wt.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the promotion policy registry and plan guidance lookup indexes.

entries.title: Plan Status Transition and Relation Rule Registries
entries.summary: Adds the missing status transition rules and relation type registries so lifecycle policy and cross-artifact relations stop living only in code and prose.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the relation type registry and status transition rule surfaces.

entries.title: Plan Template Section-Spec Enforcement Foundation
entries.summary: Adds governed section-spec schemas and validation coverage for plan template contracts and rendered surface templates.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered governed section-spec schemas, aligned template contracts to requirements.md, and added fail-closed section-spec validation for plan template assets.

entries.title: Plan Terminal Initiative Closeout Runtime
entries.summary: Adds the live terminal closeout mutation path for pack-wide and project-scoped initiative packages so closing initiatives can move into completed, superseded, or cancelled and the coordination surfaces can show recent closeouts instead of stuck active work.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the live terminal closeout runtime, CLI surface, and recent-closeout coordination flow.

entries.title: Plan Workflow Root Authority Split
entries.summary: Moves workflow-routing and workflow-module authority out of repo-root workflows/ into core/workflows/ and plan/workflows/, with route and workflow indexes rebuilt from the split roots required by requirements.md and decisions.md.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the split workflow routing tables, domain-owned workflow module roots, runtime index rebuilds, and human guidance cutover required by requirements.md and decisions.md.

entries.title: WatchTower Initial Implementation Bootstrap
entries.summary: Captures the first WatchTower project-scoped implementation package before execution starts.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the first WatchTower implementation bootstrap package and boundary capture.

entries.title: WatchTower Next Work Selection
entries.summary: Adds a local-first next-work command so operators can ask WatchTower what unfinished work should be picked up next from the current workspace state.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the local-first WatchTower next-work selection flow.

entries.title: WatchTower Status Snapshot
entries.summary: Adds one local-first status command so operators can see workspace readiness and current work-item counts from a single WatchTower entrypoint.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the local-first WatchTower status snapshot command.

entries.title: WatchTower Work Item Begin Flow
entries.summary: Adds a local-first begin command so operators can mark one WatchTower work item as actively in progress before completion.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the local-first WatchTower work-item begin flow.

entries.title: WatchTower Work Item Bootstrap
entries.summary: Adds a local-first work-item record flow so operators can start bounded work inside an initialized WatchTower workspace.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the local-first WatchTower work-item bootstrap flow.

entries.title: WatchTower Work Item Lifecycle
entries.summary: Adds local-first work-item inspection and completion flows so operators can see current work and close it cleanly inside an initialized WatchTower workspace.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the WatchTower work-item inspection and completion flows.

entries.title: WatchTower Work Item Notes
entries.summary: Adds local-first note capture on work items so operators can preserve thread context and resume a bounded slice without external scratch notes.
entries.next_action: Keep initiative-local task state current before opening follow-up work.
entries.closure_reason: Delivered the local-first WatchTower work-item note flow.

entries.title: WatchTower Workspace Init Bootstrap
entries.summary: Adds a local-first workspace manifest and init flow so later WatchTower operator work starts from a real on-disk state root.
